allow: Bash("/c/Program Files/StataNow19/StataSE-64.exe" -b do "C:/Users/joung/University of Michigan Dropbox/Andrew Joung/Research/HospitalUnions/NBER/analyze_aha_edited.do")

Bash("/c/Program Files/StataNow19/StataSE-64.exe" -b do "C:/Users/joung/University of Michigan Dropbox/Andrew Joung/Research/HospitalUnions/NBER/analyze_stdname.do")

Bash(copy "C:\\Users\\joung\\University of Michigan Dropbox\\Andrew Joung\\Research\\HospitalUnions\\NBER\\0ado\\soft_tfidf_weights.ado" "C:\\Users\\joung\\University of Michigan Dropbox\\Andrew Joung\\Research\\HospitalUnions\\NBER\\0ado\\soft_tfidf_weights_v1.0.0_backup.ado")

Bash("C:/Program Files/StataNow19/StataSE-64.exe" -b do /dev/stdin <<'STATA_EOF'
clear all
set more off
cd "C:\\Users\\joung\\University of Michigan Dropbox\\Andrew Joung\\Research\\HospitalUnions\\NBER"
adopath + "0ado"

* Check source size
use "data/edited/temp_nlrb_county.dta", clear
di "NLRB county records: " _N
tab block if _n <= 10

* Check target size
use "data/edited/temp_aha_county_1.dta", clear
di "AHA county variant 1 records: " _N

* Check how many blocks, and the size of the largest blocks
bysort block: gen block_size = _N
sum block_size, detail
di "Max block size \(AHA\): " r\(max\)

* Check NLRB block sizes
use "data/edited/temp_nlrb_county.dta", clear
bysort block: gen block_size = _N
sum block_size, detail
di "Max block size \(NLRB\): " r\(max\)
STATA_EOF)

Bash("C:/Program Files/StataNow19/StataSE-64.exe" -b do /dev/stdin <<'STATA_EOF'
clear all
di "=== NLRB county variables ==="
use "data/edited/temp_nlrb_county.dta", clear
describe, short
describe

di ""
di "=== AHA county variant 1 variables ==="
use "data/edited/temp_aha_county_1.dta", clear
describe, short
describe
STATA_EOF)
